sub_modules.bitrev_addr: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal address generator used to permute input samples into bit-reversed order before the iterative DIT butterfly stages.
sub_modules.stage_index_gen: Combinational index generator that, given the current stage (1..4) and a linear butterfly counter, computes the butterfly pair indices p,q and the twiddle factor index according to standard iterative DIT ordering.
sub_modules.twiddle_rom: Combinational ROM holding Q1.15 fixed-point cos/sin twiddle factors for indices 0..8 (k=0..N/2) as specified in the twiddle table.
sub_modules.butterfly_unit: Combinational radix-2 complex butterfly: performs Q1.15 rounded complex multiply of the second operand with the twiddle factor, then computes sum/difference with the first operand to produce the two updated outputs.
sub_modules.scale_shift: Combinational output normalization module that optionally arithmetic-right-shifts the real/imaginary values by SHIFT bits (used to divide by N=16 in IFFT mode).
